name: Sketch
description: Sketch is a digital design tool for Mac providing a REST API for managing workspaces, documents, libraries, components, prototypes, and share links in the Sketch cloud collaboration environment.

subjectOf.name: Sketch Cloud API
subjectOf.description: REST API for managing Sketch workspaces, members, and documents in the Sketch cloud collaboration platform. Supports Personal Access Token and OAuth 2.0 authentication.
